title: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER COUNSELING - 211info
text: OREGON CHANGE CLINIC SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally specific mental health and substance abuse services focusing on African American and veteran community members. Evidence-based outpatient substance use disorder treatments are conducted 10-20 hours per week, including medication-assisted treatment and recovery housing for 3-6 months or 18 months. 1312 SW Washington Street Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-6pm, Friday 8:30am-3pm Email (503) 719-7985 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 719-7985 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts Oregon Health Plan, Tricare West, and Healthscope insurance. Reduced rates available for military veterans. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of address, proof of insurance AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet MAX blue line Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * African American Community Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Veterans Medication Assisted Maintenance Treatment for Substance Use Disorders Medication Assisted Maintenance Treatment for Substance Use Disorders * African American Community Medication Assisted Maintenance Treatment for Substance Use Disorders * Veterans Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - MENTAL HEALTH THERAPY SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - WELLNESS SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON CHANGE CLINIC
